verdict.answer_first: A leads with outcome: "default to REST" in sentence 1; B also says "start with REST" sentence 1 but has softer setup, so A

verdict.actionability: A is easier to save as a rule: "start with REST" plus two flip conditions; B adds more paths and a table, so A
